docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-05-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAHMOUD LARIZADEH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SIMPLY SOLAR IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPLY SOLAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARIZADEH, MAHMOUD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIMPLY SOLAR SEE ATTACHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2025 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LARIZADEH, MAHMOUD AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPLY SOLAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-25-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPLY SOLAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-05-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF MAHMOUD LARIZADEH APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SIMPLY SOLAR. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
